summary.note: EAGLE-3 draft heads (LlamaForCausalLMEagle3, Eagle3Speculator) are not loadable by the transformers+optimum-intel pipeline. Both architectures fail at model deserialization — weight shapes are incompatible with standard CausalLM schemas. ov_genai.draft_model() requires OV IR format which cannot be produced. Disposition: FRAMEWORK_NOT_SUPPORTED.
